seoTitle: Miami Dade School Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Miami Dade school calendar 2026-2027 with Aug 13 first day, Jun 3 last day, holidays, teacher planning days, Winter Break, Spring Break, PDF and ICS.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Miami-Dade County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Miami-Dade County Public Schools is Thursday, August 13, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Miami-Dade County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Miami-Dade County Public Schools is Thursday, June 3, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Miami-Dade Winter Break in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Miami-Dade Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return after Winter Break on Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Miami-Dade Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Miami-Dade Spring Break runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027. Because March 29 is a teacher planning day, students return Tuesday, March 30, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Miami Dade school calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the PDF link on this page to open the official Miami-Dade County Public Schools 2026-2027 school calendar PDF. The district also publishes alternate calendar PDFs for technical colleges, adult education, and juvenile justice education.

calendarFaqs.q: What days are students off in Miami-Dade County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Student no-school days include holidays, teacher planning days, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, and other student holidays listed in the official M-DCPS calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Miami Dade school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides an ICS calendar file that can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. The file is a one-time import, so families should verify later district changes with Miami-Dade County Public Schools.

customSections.label: Miami Dade School Calendar PDF Guide
customSections.content: The official Miami-Dade County Public Schools calendar PDF is the source document for this page. Families use it as a printable school calendar for holidays, teacher planning days, Winter Break, Spring Break, student attendance dates, and alternate program calendars. Because M-DCPS publishes multiple calendar PDFs, families should confirm whether their student follows the elementary and secondary calendar, technical college calendar, adult education calendar, or juvenile justice education calendar.

rows: Main districtwide calendar for most M-DCPS students.
Technical college and adult education calendars
Separate schedules for career, technical, and adult education programs.
Student no-school dates that affect childcare and transportation.
Useful for travel planning, family visits, and South Florida childcare coverage.

customSections.label: Miami Dade Family Planning Guide 2026-2027
customSections.content: Miami-Dade families often use the school calendar to coordinate childcare, transportation, after-school care, family travel, hurricane-season schedule changes, and summer program timing. Before school starts on August 13, 2026, families should confirm school assignment, bus or carpool plans, meal program updates, after-school coverage, and the correct calendar type for their student's program.

rows: Confirm school assignment, transportation, supplies, meals, and after-school care.
Several student holidays during the year
Students do not attend, so families may need childcare even when staff report.
Weather closures can change attendance days or create makeup-day needs.
Flights, hotels, beaches, and attractions see heavy demand when neighboring counties align.
Miami-Dade's school year often ends later than nearby counties, affecting camp start dates.

customSections.label: Miami-Dade School Calendar Updates
customSections.content: Check this page after district calendar revisions, hurricane-related closures, board updates, or emergency schedule announcements. The official Miami-Dade County Public Schools calendar remains the final source for campus-specific updates, emergency closures, teacher planning days, and makeup-day decisions.

customSections.label: Miami-Dade Calendar Review Information
customSections.content: This page was last reviewed on July 2, 2026 against the official Miami-Dade County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar source. MySchoolDates checked the first day, last day, holidays, teacher planning days, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, alternate calendar links, downloadable files, and official source links.

customSections.label: Miami-Dade Calendar Data Coverage
customSections.content: This page covers districtwide school calendar dates, including first and last student days, holidays, teacher planning days, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, alternate calendar PDFs, and downloadable calendar files. It does not replace campus-specific event calendars, athletics schedules, graduation ceremony details, testing schedules, or individual bell schedules.

customSections.label: How This Miami-Dade Calendar Was Prepared
customSections.content: This Miami-Dade school calendar page is prepared from the district's published calendar documents. MySchoolDates extracts and reviews first and last student days, holidays and break periods, teacher planning days, alternate calendar links, and downloadable calendar files. Calendar records are maintained by the MySchoolDates Calendar Data Team, and dates are checked against the official district source before publication.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Aligned
yearNumbers.detail: For the first time, Miami-Dade's Spring Break aligns with Broward, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough counties — all four major South Florida districts break the same week.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Post-Break Gap
yearNumbers.detail: A teacher planning day on March 29 means students don't return after Spring Break until Tuesday, March 30 — effectively a 9-day break.

calendarNotes: The 2026–2027 Miami-Dade school year begins August 13, 2026, and ends June 3, 2027 — later than neighboring Broward and Palm Beach counties. Spring Break runs March 22–26; because March 29 is a teacher planning day, students don't return to class until Tuesday, March 30. This year, Miami-Dade's break aligns with Broward, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough counties — in many years, the South Florida counties stagger their breaks across consecutive weeks.
